languages.text: "Одели меня.... в чужую плоть. Но-но-но..." {n}Старик пускает слюну и, сам того не замечая, ломает себе палец за пальцем, лепеча бессмыслицу. Вдруг он вскидывает руки вверх и вопит:{/n} "Дух бьется! Освободить его... Навстречу Его благодати!"

"They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but..." {n}The old man starts babbling and drooling, breaking his own fingers one after another without even noticing. Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"
languages.original_text: "Одели меня.... в чужую плоть. Но-но-но..." {n}Старик пускает слюну и, сам того не замечая, ломает себе палец за пальцем, лепеча бессмыслицу. Вдруг он вскидывает руки вверх и вопит:{/n} "Дух бьется! Освободить его... Навстречу Его благодати!"

"They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but... My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

"They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but..." {n}The old man starts babbling and drooling, breaking his own fingers one after another without even noticing. Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

"They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but..." {n}The old man starts babbling and drooling, breaking his own fingers one after another without even noticing. Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

languages.text: 「私は誰かの肉体で着せ替えられた。誰がしたのかはわからない。しかし私の魂はそこにいる。苦しみ、解放を求めている。神の慈悲に放たれるために！」
languages.original_text: "I have been dressed in another's flesh by unknown hands. But my spirit is there, I can feel it struggling, begging to be set free... To be released into His grace!"

traits.locale_text: 「私は誰かの肉体で着せ替えられた。誰がしたのかはわからない。しかし私の魂はそこにいる。苦しみ、解放を求めている。神の慈悲に放たれるために！」

languages.text: “他们把我……塞进了别人的血肉。可是，可是，可是……”{n}老人开始胡言乱语，口水直流，一根根地掰断自己的手指，却完全没有察觉。随后他举起双手尖叫道：{/n}“我的灵魂在挣扎！我得把它释放出来……献给祂的恩典！”
languages.original_text: "They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but..." {n}The old man starts babbling and drooling, breaking his own fingers one after another without even noticing. Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

traits.locale_text: “他们把我……塞进了别人的血肉。可是，可是，可是……”{n}老人开始胡言乱语，口水直流，一根根地掰断自己的手指，却完全没有察觉。随后他举起双手尖叫道：{/n}“我的灵魂在挣扎！我得把它释放出来……献给祂的恩典！”

languages.text: « On m'a revêtu... De la chair d'un autre. Mais, mais... » {n}Le vieil homme commence à bafouiller et à baver, se brisant les doigts l'un après l'autre sans même le remarquer. Puis il lève les mains soudainement et hurle : {/n}« Mon esprit se débat ! Je dois le libérer... Rejoindre Sa grâce ! »
languages.original_text: "They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but..." {n}The old man starts babbling and drooling, breaking his own fingers one after another without even noticing. Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

traits.locale_text: « On m'a revêtu... De la chair d'un autre. Mais, mais... » {n}Le vieil homme commence à bafouiller et à baver, se brisant les doigts l'un après l'autre sans même le remarquer. Puis il lève les mains soudainement et hurle : {/n}« Mon esprit se débat ! Je dois le libérer... Rejoindre Sa grâce ! »

languages.text: «Me han vestido... con la carne de otro. Pero, pero, pero...». {n}El anciano empieza a balbucear y babear, rompiéndose los dedos de uno en uno sin darse cuenta. Después, levanta las manos y grita:{/n} «¡Mi espíritu se debate! ¡Debo liberarlo... ante Su gracia!»,
languages.original_text: "They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but..." {n}The old man starts babbling and drooling, breaking his own fingers one after another without even noticing. Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

traits.locale_text: «Me han vestido... con la carne de otro. Pero, pero, pero...». {n}El anciano empieza a balbucear y babear, rompiéndose los dedos de uno en uno sin darse cuenta. Después, levanta las manos y grita:{/n} «¡Mi espíritu se debate! ¡Debo liberarlo... ante Su gracia!»,

languages.text: "Beni... Başkasının etiyle giydirdiler. Ama, ama, ama..." {n}İhtiyar; mırıldanmaya ve salyalarını akıtmaya başlıyor, farkına bile varmadan kendi parmaklarını birbiri ardına kırıyor. Ardından ellerini havaya kaldırıp çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Ruhum mücadele ediyor! O'nun lütfuna doğru... Serbest bırakmalıyım!"
languages.original_text: "They dressed me... in another's flesh. But, but, but..." {n}The old man starts babbling and drooling, breaking his own fingers one after another without even noticing. Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

traits.locale_text: "Beni... Başkasının etiyle giydirdiler. Ama, ama, ama..." {n}İhtiyar; mırıldanmaya ve salyalarını akıtmaya başlıyor, farkına bile varmadan kendi parmaklarını birbiri ardına kırıyor. Ardından ellerini havaya kaldırıp çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Ruhum mücadele ediyor! O'nun lütfuna doğru... Serbest bırakmalıyım!"

languages.text: "Sie steckten mich ... in das Fleisch eines anderen. Aber, aber, aber ..." {n}Der alte Mann brabbelt wirres Zeug und bricht sich einen Finger nach dem anderen, ohne es zu bemerken. Schließlich hebt er die Arme und schreit:{/n} "Mein Geist taumelt! Ich muss ihn befreien ... in Seine Gnade!"

Then he throws up his hands and screams,{/n} "My spirit's struggling! I need to set it free... into His grace!"

Ich muss ihn befreien ... in Seine Gnade!"
